pi_items.source: Task description line 6: 'Save the completed flipchart as /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/daily_schedule.flipchart'; export_result.sh line 12
Task description line 6 specifies full path; setup_task.sh line 12 creates directory; setup_activinspire.sh line 31 confirms path
Task description line 6: 'Create a 2-page flipchart'; README line 13 confirms '2-page flipchart'; verifier.py line 89 checks for page_count >= 2

Task description line 6 specifies schedule items: '8:00 - Morning Meeting', '9:00 - Reading', '10:00 - Math', '11:00 - Science', '12:00 - Lunch'; Page 2 requires 'Homework'; export_result.sh lines 70-90 verify all terms via regex patterns

Task description: 'at least 5 colored rectangle blocks' on Page 1 + 'at least 3 labeled rectangle boxes' on Page 2 = 8 total; verifier.py line 157 checks rect_count >= 8; export_result.sh line 95 counts AsRectangle elements
Task description line 6 specifies 'elementary school teacher'; task is about creating classroom schedule display (classroom management); README line 24 tags as education and classroom-management

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a 2-page ActivInspire flipchart file named 'daily_schedule.flipchart' saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/'. Page 1 must include the title 'Daily Schedule' and at least 5 colored rectangle blocks containing the schedule items 'Morning Meeting', 'Reading', 'Math', 'Science', and 'Lunch' with their corresponding times. Page 2 must include the title 'Homework' and at least 3 labeled rectangle boxes for homework subjects. The total number of rectangle shapes must be at least 8. All required terms ('Schedule', 'Morning Meeting', 'Reading', 'Math', 'Science', 'Lunch', 'Homework') must appear in the flipchart XML content. The task is designed for elementary school classroom management.
